name: 3 Position Tension Recliner Outdoor Portable Camp Chair Green - Embark™: High Backs, Steel Frame
description:
Sit back and relax anywhere with this 3-Position Recliner Chair from Embark™. Supported on a metal frame, this outdoor chair features a recycled polyester fabric seat and back. The reclining back design and padded armrests provide added comfort, while a built-in cup holder lets you keep your cool drink handy. Strong yet lightweight, this chair can be easily folded and carried anywhere — from the backyard to the beach, as well as camping or tailgating — making it a great pick for the outdoors. Plus, it comes with a carrying case and built-in handles for easy toting.

Embark™: Find wonder as you wander.
